intro: This archive contains 12 articles from April 13 to April 20, 2026, covering cloud security incidents and analysis. The reporting details a mix of 2 critical, 8 high, and 2 informational severity events affecting a global scope. The threat actor APT41 was prominently active during this period, exploiting vulnerabilities including CVE-2026-33413, which carries a CVSS score of 8.8. The technology, government, healthcare, and cloud services sectors were the primary targets of these campaigns, with cloud-services providers facing significant attention from adversaries.
